title: Pentagon strikes deals with 8 Big Tech companies after shunning Anthropic
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Pentagon has signed AI contracts with eight major tech companies, excluding Anthropic, for classified networks. The companies include Google, Microsoft, and
excerpt: The Pentagon has signed AI contracts with eight major tech companies, excluding Anthropic, for classified networks. The companies include Google, Microsoft, and Amazon Web Services. The decision followed Anthropic's refusal to allow military use of its AI for certain purposes.

content.introduction: The Pentagon has signed AI contracts with eight major tech companies, excluding Anthropic, for classified networks. The companies include Google, Microsoft, and Amazon Web Services. The decision followed Anthropic's refusal to allow military use of its AI for certain purposes.
body: [Skip to content](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#main-content). [The Eight Companies and What They Got](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#the-eight-companies-and-what-they-got). [How Anthropic Lost the Pentagon](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#how-anthropic-lost-the-pentagon). [The Companies Anthropic Used to Compete With Are Now Inside the Tent](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#the-companies-anthropic-used-to-compete-with-are-now-inside-the-tent). [What This Means for Practitioners](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#what-this-means-for-practitioners). [The Other Side](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#the-other-side). [The Bottom Line](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#the-bottom-line). [Sources](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/pentagon-signs-eight-ai-companies-anthropic-excluded#sources). Two months ago, the [companies that beat Anthropic to the Pentagon's first contract spillover were OpenAI and xAI](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/altman-called-the-pentagon-deal-sloppy-1-5-million-users-had-already-left). [Google signed a Gemini-on-classified-networks deal over the public objection of 600 of its own employees](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/google-pentagon-gemini-classified-deal-employee-revolt) on April 28. *   [Pentagon strikes deals with 7 Big Tech companies after shunning Anthropic](https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/01/tech/pentagon-ai-anthropic) (CNN Business, May 1, 2026). May 1, 2026](https://letsdatascience.com/blog/mistral-medium-3-5-128b-open-weight-merged-model)[News 7 min ### Anthropic Closed a $380 Billion Round in February. The Pentagon has existing AI contracts with several companies, including Palantir and [OpenAI](https://www.cnn.com/2026/02/27/tech/openai-pentagon-deal-ai-systems). But President Donald Trump announced the administration would [sever ties](https://www.cnn.com/2026/02/27/tech/anthropic-pentagon-deadline) with the company after Anthropic refused to back down on terms that would allow the military to use Claude for “all lawful purposes,” including autonomous weapons and mass surveillance. *   [Sign out](https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/01/tech/pentagon-ai-anthropic#). *   [US](https://www.cnn.com/us). *   [World](https://www.cnn.com/world). *   [Business](https://www.cnn.com/business). *   [Tech](https://www.cnn.com/business/tech). *   [Videos](https://www.cnn.com/business/videos). *   [Markets](https://www.cnn.com/markets). *   [After-Hours](https://www.cnn.com/markets/after-hours). *   [Markets Now](https://www.cnn.com/business/markets-now). *   [Health](https://www.cnn.com/health). *   [Tech](https://www.cnn.com/business/tech). *   [Style](https://www.cnn.com/style). *   [Travel](https://www.cnn.com/travel). *   [Sports](https://www.cnn.com/sports). *   [Featured](https://www.cnn.com/watch). *   [Clips](https://www.cnn.com/videos). *   [CNN 10](https://www.cnn10.com/). *   [Listen](https://www.cnn.com/audio). *   [About CNN](https://www.cnn.com/about). *   [Sign out](https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/01/tech/pentagon-ai-anthropic#).
